notes: Fixes the Bluetooth firmware update that failed with 'aborted' (a stale-session clear was being misread as a fatal error — updates now start cleanly, recover dropped packets, and handle a busy device). Update-over-Bluetooth now shows the new version + release notes as bullet points before you start, and the Bluetooth icon was removed from the button. Camera preview shows a green target border for aiming. All pop-ups now blur the background and are readable on both dark and light themes.
